---
title: "Transit Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(psrc.travelsurvey)
library(magrittr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(psrcplot)
library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Specify which variables to retrieve
vars <- c("mode_class", "mode_class_5", "transit_freq", "mode_acc", "commute_mode", "dest_purpose", "home_county", "home_rgcname", "home_jurisdiction", "home_rgcname")

survey_year <- c(
  "2017", "2019", "2021", "2023", 
  "2025")

# Retrieve the data
hts_data <- get_psrc_hts(survey_vars = vars, survey_year=survey_year)  # default includes all survey_years
  
# Calculate a numeric summary, i.e. min/max/median/mean
# rs1 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data,
#                      analysis_unit = "trip",
#                      group_vars = "hhsize",
#                      stat_var = "distance_miles",
#                      incl_na = FALSE)
# 
# head(dplyr::select(rs1, -c(survey_year, min, max)))

# Calculate a categorical summary, i.e. count/share
hts_data_mode <- hts_bin_mode(hts_data)

df <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data_mode, "trip", "mode_class_5", incl_na=FALSE) 

df$survey_year<-as.character(df$survey_year)  

df$mode_class_5 <- factor(df$mode_class_5,
         levels = c("Bike/Micromobility", "Drive", "Other",
                    "Transit", "Walk"))

#write.xlsx(df, 'mode_class.xlsx')

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Trips Count
df_count <- df %>% group_by(survey_year) %>% summarise(total = sum(est))

trips_chart <- static_column_chart(df_count, x='survey_year', y='total', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     #moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Total Trips in Region'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

trips_chart
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

mode_chart <- static_column_chart(df, x='mode_class_5', y='prop', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Share Trips in Region'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

mode_chart
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
df_year <- df %>% filter(survey_year==2025)

mode_chart_year <- static_column_chart(df_year, x='mode_class_5', y='prop', fill='mode_class_5',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Trips by Mode - Share (2025)'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

mode_chart_year

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## transit trips count
df2 <- df %>% filter(mode_class_5=="Transit")
df2$survey_year<-as.character(df2$survey_year)

transit_chart_count <- static_column_chart(df2, x='survey_year', y='est', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Count',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='est_moe',
                                     title='Transit Trips - Count'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

transit_chart_count
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## transit trips share
transit_chart <- static_column_chart(df2, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Transit Trips - Share'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

transit_chart
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## walk trips count
df3 <- df %>% filter(mode_class_5=="Walk")
df3$survey_year<-as.character(df3$survey_year)

walk_chart_count <- static_column_chart(df3, x='survey_year', y='est', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Count',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='est_moe',
                                     title='Walk Trips - Count'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

walk_chart_count
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## walk trips share
walk_chart <- static_column_chart(df3, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Walk Trips - Share'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

walk_chart
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## bike/micro trips count
df4 <- df %>% filter(mode_class_5=="Bike/Micromobility")
df4$survey_year<-as.character(df4$survey_year)

bike_chart_count <- static_column_chart(df4, x='survey_year', y='est', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Count',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='est_moe',
                                     title='Bike/Micromobility Trips - Count'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

bike_chart_count
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## bike/micro trips share
bike_chart <- static_column_chart(df4, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='survey_year',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Bike/Micromobility Trips - Share'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

bike_chart
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

df_filtered <- df %>% filter(mode_class_5 != "Drive")

mode_chart_nodrive <- static_column_chart(df_filtered, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='mode_class_5',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                     #xlabel='Mode',
                                     moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Mode Share without Drive'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20)) 

mode_chart_nodrive
```

Transit Share

```{r}
#| echo: false

transit_chart <- static_column_chart(df2, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='mode_class_5',
                                     ylabel= 'Share',
                                         #xlabel='Mode', 
                                         moe='prop_moe',
                                     title='Share of Transit Trips'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))

transit_chart

```

Transit Frequency

```{r}
#| echo: false

#add bucket frequency

hts_data$person <- mutate(
  hts_data$person,
  transit_freq_bucket=case_when(
    transit_freq=='6-7 days a week' ~ '6-7 days a week',
    transit_freq=='5 days a week' ~ '5 days a week',
    transit_freq==c('2 days a week', '3 days a week', '4 days a week', '2-4 days a week') 
    ~ '2-4 days a week',
    transit_freq=='1 day a week'~ '1 day a week',
    transit_freq=='1-3 days in the past month'~ '1-3 days in the past month',
    transit_freq=='Never in the past 30 days'~ 'Never in the past 30 days'
    ))

df3 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("transit_freq_bucket"), incl_na=FALSE)

df3$survey_year<-as.character(df3$survey_year)

df3$transit_freq_bucket <-
  factor(df3$transit_freq_bucket,
         levels = c("6-7 days a week", "5 days a week", "2-4 days a week",
                    "1 day a week", "1-3 days in the past month", 
                    "Never in the past 30 days"))

transit_freq_chart <- static_column_chart(df3, x='transit_freq_bucket', y='prop', fill='survey_year',ylabel= 'Share',
                                  #xlabel='Mode',
                                  title='Transit Frequency',
                                  moe='prop_moe'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
        legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
        axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))

transit_freq_chart

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# mode_acc to transit
# df3.5 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("mode_acc"), incl_na=FALSE)
# 
# df3.5$survey_year<-as.character(df3.5$survey_year)
# 
# #write.xlsx(df3.5, 'transit_mode2.xlsx')
# 
# transit_acc_chart_detail <- static_column_chart(df3.5, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='mode_acc',ylabel= 'Share',
#                                          #xlabel='Mode', 
#                                          moe='prop_moe'
# ) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
#           axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
#           legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
#           axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
#           axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))
# 
# transit_acc_chart_detail

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

#add homegeog purpose
hts_data$hh <- mutate(
  hts_data$hh,
  homegeog=case_when(
    home_rgcname=='Seattle Downtown'~ 'Seattle Downtown',
    (home_rgcname!='Seattle Downtown' & home_jurisdiction=='Seattle') ~ 'Seattle Outside Downtown',
    home_jurisdiction=='Bellevue' ~ 'Bellevue',
    ((home_county=='King' &!home_jurisdiction %in% c('Seattle', 'Bellevue'))|home_county=='Snohomish')~'Snohomish-King Suburban',
    .default=home_county))
# 
df3.6 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("homegeog", "mode_acc"), incl_na=FALSE) %>% filter(survey_year=="2023") %>% filter(mode_acc=="Walked or jogged")
# 
# df3.6$survey_year<-as.character(df3.6$survey_year)
# 
# 
# transit_acc_chart_detail <- static_column_chart(df3.6, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='transit_mode_bucket',ylabel= 'Share',
#                                          #xlabel='Mode',
#                                          moe='prop_moe',
#                                          color='pgnobgy_10',
#                                          title='Mode Access to Transit'
# ) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
#           axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
#           legend.text = element_text(size=14),
#           axis.title.y=element_text(size=20),
#           axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))
# 
# transit_acc_chart_detail
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
# mode based on home rgc/not rgc

# create new variable
hts_data$hh <- mutate(
  hts_data$hh,
  rgchome=if_else((!is.na(home_rgcname) & home_rgcname!='Not RGC'),"Regional Growth Center", "Not Regional Growth Center"))

# walk trips
df3.7 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("rgchome", "mode_class_5"), incl_na=FALSE) %>% filter(mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility")
# 
# df3.7$survey_year<-as.character(df3.7$survey_year) 

# transit_acc_chart_detail_nowalk <- static_column_chart(df3.7, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='transit_mode_bucket',ylabel= 'Share',
#                                          #xlabel='Mode',
#                                          moe='prop_moe',
#                                          color='pgnobgy_10',
#                                          title='Mode Access to Transit'
# ) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
#           axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
#           legend.text = element_text(size=14),
#           axis.title.y=element_text(size=20),
#           axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))
# 
# transit_acc_chart_detail_nowalk
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
hts_data2 <-  
  hts_bin_transit_mode_acc(hts_data)

df4 <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data2, "trip", c("transit_mode_acc"), incl_na=FALSE) 

df4$survey_year<-as.character(df4$survey_year)

transit_acc_chart <- static_column_chart(df4, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='transit_mode_acc',ylabel= 'Share',
                                         title='Access to Transit Trips - Share', 
                                         moe='prop_moe'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))

transit_acc_chart

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
## access to transit trips without walk
df5 <- df4 %>%
  filter(transit_mode_acc!="Walked or jogged")

df5$survey_year<-as.character(df5$survey_year)

transit_acc_chart_wo_walk <- static_column_chart(df5, x='survey_year', y='prop', fill='transit_mode_acc',ylabel= 'Share',
                                         title='Access to Transit Trips - Share (no walk)', 
                                         moe='prop_moe'
) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y=element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=14), 
          axis.title.y=element_text(size=20), 
          axis.title.x=element_text(size=20))

transit_acc_chart_wo_walk

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# trip mode share by county

hts_data$trip <- mutate(
  hts_data$trip,
 mode_bucket=case_when(
    mode_class %in% c('Drive SOV') ~ 'Drive Alone',
    mode_class %in% c('Drive HOV2', 'Drive HOV3') ~ 'Carpool',
    mode_class %in% c('Transit') ~ 'Transit',
    mode_class %in% c('School bus', 'Ride hail', 'Other') ~ 'Other',
    mode_class %in% c('Walk') ~ 'Walk',
    mode_class %in% c('Bike', 'Micromobility') ~ 'Bike/Micromobility'
    ))

df_county <- psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("home_county", "mode_bucket"), incl_na=FALSE) %>% filter(survey_year=="2025")

df_county2 <-  psrc_hts_stat(hts_data, "trip", c("home_county", "mode_class_5"), incl_na=FALSE) %>% filter(survey_year=="2023")

```
